nodes.name: Webhook: Blog Published
nodes.notes: Phase 3+ workflow. Triggered when a new blog post is published. Expected payload: { title, url, content, category, author }

nodes.name: Emergency Stop Check
nodes.notes: KILL SWITCH: Checks EMERGENCY_STOP env var. If true, notifies Discord and halts the workflow. Must be first node after trigger.

nodes.name: Emergency Stop Pre-Post
nodes.notes: KILL SWITCH: Second EMERGENCY_STOP check before storing blog data. Catches mid-execution stop activation.

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.notes: Validate webhook payload: required fields, URL domain whitelist (voidai.com, docs.voidai.com), HTTPS check. Truncate content to 8000 chars.

nodes.name: Sanitize Content
nodes.notes: SECURITY: Sanitize all webhook content per CLAUDE.md prompt injection safeguards. Strips instruction-like patterns, removes URLs from content body, removes non-printable/zero-width chars, strips HTML/script tags. Title: 200 chars, author: 100 chars, content: 5000 chars (intentional exception to the 500-char rule for blog content, which needs sufficient context for manual derivative generation).

nodes.name: Response: Error
nodes.notes: Return HTTP 400 to webhook caller when input validation fails.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN?
nodes.notes: FAIL-SAFE: Only proceed to store blog data when DRY_RUN is strictly 'false'. Any other value (true, unset, typo) routes to dry-run log.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN Log
nodes.notes: Log dry-run details. Output sent to Discord for visibility.

nodes.name: Discord: DRY_RUN Log
nodes.notes: Send dry-run log to Discord instead of filesystem. continueOnFail ensures the Response: DRY_RUN node fires even if Discord is unreachable, preventing webhook caller hangs.

nodes.name: Response: DRY_RUN
nodes.notes: Return HTTP 200 to webhook caller in dry-run mode.

nodes.name: Store Blog Data
nodes.notes: Store sanitized blog data to workflow static data for manual derivative generation via Claude Code skills. Keeps last 20 entries.

nodes.name: Discord: Blog Received
nodes.notes: Notify that blog data has been stored and derivatives should be generated manually. continueOnFail prevents Discord outages from blocking the success response.

nodes.name: Response: Success
nodes.notes: Return HTTP 200 to webhook caller after blog data has been stored.
